sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports dizziness, particularly when rising quickly. He also states his blood pressure is elevated and that he takes tylenol. The patient reports his blood sugar is elevated.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 138/82 mmHg. Heart rate is 88 bpm. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and elevated blood pressure suggest hypertension and hyperglycemia.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a blood pressure monitoring schedule three times a week. Continue the patient's current medication regimen, including chlorthalidone.
